items.title: CVE-2025-9725 | Cudy LT500E up to 2.3.12 Web Interface shadow hard-coded password (EUVD-2025-26291)

The LT500E does not have an administrator password set by default; a new password (at least 8 characters ) must be manually created upon first login the web management page."
